# CircAp { #astroapers.CircAp }

```python
CircAp(positions, r, *, validate=True)
```

Circular aperture in pixel coordinates.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**positions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple or array - like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Aperture center or centers as ``(x, y)`` pixel coordinates. Multiple centers are accepted as an ``(N, 2)`` array-like object.

<code>[**r**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [float]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Aperture radius in pixels.

<code>[**validate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If `False`, skip input validation and assume finite, positive geometry and normalized positions. This is intended for expert high-throughput code paths.
